#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_howitzer
#   year=1917 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1918 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # early_artillery — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = early_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_field_gun — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_howitzer — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = basic_mortars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_mortars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = prewar_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = prewar_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = prewar_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = prewar_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_field_gun — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_howitzer — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_howitzer }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_mortars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = improved_mortars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_technology = basic_howitzer

            NOT = { has_technology = poisonous_gas_shell_tech }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_technology = basic_howitzer
        }
        add_technology = poisonous_gas_shell_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_field_gun — 1917

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = advanced_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_howitzer — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = advanced_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_field_gun1 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_dp_light_battery — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) ──

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_design]

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_design]

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1919 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1919 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1920 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1920 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_classification]

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1922 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1922 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_technology = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_technology = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis — 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank — 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_technology = tank_classification
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / INFANTRY (43 techs) ──

# infantry_weapons

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

#   year=1904 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons1

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons
#   year=1905 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines
#   year=1910 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers
#   year=1910 branch=land category=infantry

#   year=1912 branch=land category=infantry

# basic_grenades
#   year=1912 branch=land category=infantry

#   year=1912 branch=land category=infantry

# improved_infantry_weapons_2

#   year=1915 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_special_forces

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

#   year=1915 branch=land category=infantry

# marines2
#   year=1916 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers2
#   year=1916 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_grenades
#   year=1916 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0 deps=[chemical_warfare_tech]

# infantry_at
#   year=1917 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1917 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons3
#   year=1917 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# extreme_environment_training
#   year=1917 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# survival_training
#   year=1917 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons
#   year=1918 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_machine_guns
#   year=1918 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_at2
#   year=1920 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons3
#   year=1920 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons4
#   year=1920 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons5
#   year=1922 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# elite_forces
#   year=1922 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons4
#   year=1924 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons6
#   year=1924 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # infantry_weapons — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # machine_guns — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_grenades — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1904 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = early_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons1 — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons2 — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_machine_guns — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = basic_machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_grenades — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = basic_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_special_forces — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_grenades — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons_2 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_infantry_weapons_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_infantry_weapons_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 — 1915

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) ──

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[tank_design]

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1917 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[tank_design]

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1919 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1919 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1922 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1922 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # basic_light_tank — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) ──

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # mechanised_infantry — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) ──

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    # main_battle_tank — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MOTORISED (3 techs) ──

# tech_trucks
#   year=1914 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[mechanical_engineering, magneto_ignition]

# wartime_trucks
#   year=1917 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1920 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    # tech_trucks — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            has_technology = mechanical_engineering
            has_technology = magneto_ignition
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # wartime_trucks — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = wartime_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = wartime_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry — 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1938 branch=land category=support

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1938 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_armored_motorized_military_police_tech
#   year=1938 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision
#   year=1943 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # basic_railways — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_railways }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_railways
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_train — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = basic_railways
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # narrow_gauge_railway — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = narrow_gauge_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = narrow_gauge_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # standard_gauge_railway — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = standard_gauge_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = standard_gauge_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support — 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electric_railway — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electric_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = electric_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_pioneers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_pioneers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_pioneers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_rangers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_rangers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_technology = wartime_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_gas_mask — 1915

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_gas_mask }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # mechanical_engineering — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # magneto_ignition — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = magneto_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = magneto_ignition
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coil_ignition — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coil_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = coil_ignition
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # distributor_based_ignition — 1914

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = distributor_based_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = distributor_based_ignition

            has_technology = magneto_ignition
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (21 techs) ──

# ironclad_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1880 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_heavy_shell

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_heavy

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_medium_shell
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_shell
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    # ironclad_ship_hull_heavy — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ironclad_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ironclad_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_medium_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_medium_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_shell
    # early_battlecruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / CARRIERS (10 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[scout_plane]

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    # early_ship_hull_carrier — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_technology = scout_plane
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / DESTROYERS (19 techs) ──

# torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light
#   year=1880 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# gunboat_ship_hull_light
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1904 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1904 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sonar
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_sonar
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25
