#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    # torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gunboat_ship_hull_light — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gunboat_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = gunboat_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # improved_ship_hull_light — 1916

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_sonar — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # basic_destroyer — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # advanced_sonar — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # modern_sonar — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_destroyer — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (4 techs) ──

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (16 techs) ──

# victorian_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1880 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# coastal_defense_ship_armor_scheme
#   year=1895 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1904 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1908 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1908 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# interwar_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    # victorian_ship_hull_cruiser — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = victorian_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = victorian_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): coastal_defense_ship_armor_scheme
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_light_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_ship_hull_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = interwar_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# tank_landing_craft
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # ironclad_artillery — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ironclad_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ironclad_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_secondary_battery — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_secondary_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_secondary_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ironclad_coal_engine — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ironclad_coal_engine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ironclad_coal_engine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_torpedo_tubes — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_torpedo_tubes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_torpedo_tubes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines — 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battery — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── NAVAL / SUBMARINES (12 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1904 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[basic_torpedo]

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[advanced_generator]

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    # early_ship_hull_submarine — 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_technology = basic_torpedo
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_submarine — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine_snorkel — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_technology = advanced_generator
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_submarine — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_submarine — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
